summary: Lead accepts M3-H003-H005 validation after test_engineer REVIEW, gameplay_designer PARTIAL validation interpretation, historical_researcher no-Human-Gate risk review, independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT, and lead-side reproduced pre-integration gates. The task remains ACCEPTED until the PR enters main; it will only be marked CLOSED after merge and sync.
commit: 22029cec evidence; fa6c7acd review route; accepted-state commit pending

tests_run.command: pnpm exec prettier --check tests/m3-h003-h005-validation.test.ts and handoff JSON files
pnpm exec vitest run tests/m3-h003-h005-validation.test.ts --config vitest.config.ts
node -e JSON parse/shape check for M3-H003-H005-VALIDATION-001
tests_run.result: ok; status IN_PROGRESS during lead pre-review, 10 required tests, 14 allowed paths, 18 forbidden paths
root 25 files / 165 tests plus web 1 file / 3 tests passed before acceptance-state commit
targeted Vitest, taskctl validate, Prettier, diff check, sim:determinism, sim:perf-baseline, build:web, Chromium e2e, pnpm test, JSON shape all passed

decisions: Accepted H-003 as initial M3 fixture evidence: direct-control, restore-vassal-ruler, and tribute-only produce different 24-month outcomes; direct annexation is not trivially dominant across income, tribute, load, reliability, troops, and risk.

Accepted H-005 as initial fixture-level evidence rather than final player-study proof: reason/proposal cues are useful and not always optimal under current scaffold metrics, with reason-code coverage across appointment, behavior, bulk, enfeoffment, obligation, policy, and succession.
Accepted historical_researcher classification that current validation evidence is in-house abstraction / prototype inference / intentional gameplay deviation, with no Human Gate required.
Kept live player telemetry, full proposal AI, formal historical content, roadmap/gate edits, dependencies, and production worker integration expansion out of scope.
risks: H-003 evidence is one deterministic M3 fixture with prototype balance constants, not global balance proof.
H-005 does not measure live acceptance or regret rates; it proves fixture-level non-optimality and reason usefulness only.
Browser smoke remains protocol/read-model coverage, not full live production worker integration.
Validation labels must be routed back to historical review if promoted to formal historical content or scenario data.
requested_action: Commit accepted state, run integration gates, open PR, require CI, merge, sync main, then mark M3-H003-H005-VALIDATION-001 CLOSED and continue to M3-EXIT-VALIDATION-001.
